title: ProCast X1 Microphone
description: Professional grade condenser microphone with cardioid polar pattern. Includes shock mount and pop filter.

title: SoundSpace Studio
description: Professional podcast studio with acoustic treatment, multiple microphones and mixing console. Hourly rental.

title: BroadCast Dynamic Mic
description: Industry standard dynamic microphone for podcasting and broadcasting. Exceptional sound isolation.

title: AudioLink Pro Interface
description: 4-channel USB audio interface with high-quality preamps and zero-latency monitoring. Perfect for podcast production.

title: AudioEdit Pro Software
description: Professional audio editing software designed specifically for podcast production with intelligent noise reduction.

title: Remote Recording Service
description: Professional remote recording service with high-quality audio capture for interviews and multi-guest podcasts.

title: Studio Voice Microphone
description: Premium large-diaphragm studio microphone for pristine vocal capture. Features a wide frequency response and high SPL handling.

title: PodcastPro Boom Arm
description: Heavy-duty adjustable boom arm with integrated cable management. Compatible with most microphones up to 2.2 lbs.

title: Elite Podcast Studio Package
description: Complete podcast studio setup with microphones, interface, monitor headphones, boom arms, and acoustic treatment panels.
